Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went sightseeing around[n]Kyoto aboard a tour bus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It was much more exciting seeing the[n]historical locations in person than in photos.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In the afternoon, we all went our separate[n]ways at the Kamogawa River, near the hotel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}We should probably head back. We don't wanna miss curfew.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Not to mention Shijo Street will be crawling with drunks and couples the longer we stay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Why are you so concerned about me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It was our fight that brought us together. And now, that fight is over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}We have no common goal, no enemy to defeat. You have no reason to associate with me anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You don't have to be hurtful about this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}We've reached our conclusion. Why should we keep fighting?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Everything I believed in was a lie. And in the end, I...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You couldn't protect someone important to you? Is that what you're trying to say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You said you wanted to atone for the Kirijo Group's past, but that's not true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You were really only fighting to protect your father.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That's right! I fought to protect him, and look what happened![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I was blinded by my trust for Ikutsuki, and fell right into his trap! There was nothing I could do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}My father bore the burden of responsibility entirely on his own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}And ever since that incident, he looked like he was dead inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I fought so he could be free of the shame and guilt weighing down on him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But it was all pointless. I never should have gotten involved![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But we don't know that for sure yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}You know, I used to live around here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}After my dad died, my mom spent all her time throwing herself at random men.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I couldn't stand seeing that side of her, so I used to come out here to the riverbank to get away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}At that point, believing in my dad was all I had.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Your father only did what he thought was best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}He was involved in dangerous work, but in the end, he fought to make things right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}He believed the Shadows needed to be stopped, even if it meant losing his life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That's why I choose to fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'm going to destroy the Dark Hour and finish what my dad started.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}That's all I can do. That we can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}We're going to see this through to the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}For my father's sake... and for yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Yukari, let's face what comes next together, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}All right, let's head on back and check out the bath.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Yeah, the outdoor hot spring back at the hotel. It's really nice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Now that everything's out in the open, we have nothing left to hide![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}H-Hey, stop blushing! You're making this awkward for both of us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}C'mon, let's get going! It's already past curfew.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}You don't need to worry, Father.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}And I won't turn back anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Mitsuru's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Penthesilea{f 0 1 27}, has given rise to {f 0 1 35}Artemisia{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
